name: loadCalculation
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data (ManualJCalc.callHvac channel: runDomain → {input:{artifact:{data}}} peeled at dispatch). coolingBTU = round(sqft*25 * insMult * climateMult * storyMult); insMult excellent 0.8 / good 0.9 / average 1.0 / else 1.2; climateMult very-cold 1.35 / humid 1.25 / hot 1.3 / cold 1.2 / else 1.0 (accepts the component's region enums hot-humid/hot-dry/temperate/cold/very-cold via .includes, not just bare keywords). heatingBTU = round(cooling * (cold?1.1:0.85)); tonnage = round(cooling/12000,1); equipmentSize = ceil(tons*2)/2 + ' ton system'. Fail-CLOSED numerics: Number()+Number.isFinite, so 'Infinity'/'NaN'/'12abc' fall to defaults (1000 sqft / 1 story) — never NaN/Infinity, never a silently-accepted '12abc'→12 prefix. Result card renders heatingBTU/coolingBTU/tonnageRecommended/equipmentSize/recommendation EXACTLY (the prior fields requiredBTU/tonnage/unitSize/estimatedCost/energyEstimate/seerRecommendation were NOT what the card read — fixed 2026-06-28; those are retained as aliases for the SaveAsDtu provenance + back-compat).
